items.back: Apply TRSA procedures within the designated TRSA IN ADDITION to the basic services in Section 6. TRSA is an overlay, not a replacement for basic radar service.
Any ONE of: visual separation (7-2-1), radar separation (Ch. 5), nonradar separation (Ch. 6), or pilot-applied visual separation (7-2-1). Separate VFR from IFR and other participating VFR.
Need NOT be separated from other helicopters or powered-lift aircraft. BUT: traffic information must be exchanged as required by 2-1-21.
Must meet MVA, MSA, or minimum IFR altitude criteria. If contrary to 14 CFR 91.159, pilot must advise ATC; ATC may assign alternate. Below MVA: pilot responsible for terrain/obstruction.
